description.value:
Pathway Vector: forceful storm-borne authority, sea-forged mobility, and relentless momentum that pressures enemies into bad positions.

Sequence 9 Package (Total Budget 2): Riptide Command, Phantom Scales.

Sequence 8 Package (Gain Budget +3): Wrath, Raging Blow, and one legacy scope upgrade to Riptide Command.

Sequence 7 Package (Gain Budget +13): Navigation, Drowning Film, Azure Surge, plus two legacy upgrades (Riptide Command and Phantom Scales).

Sequence 6 Package (Gain Budget +9): Tempest Glide, Windblade Tithe, Sea Voice Requisition, plus two legacy upgrades (Riptide Command and Wrath).

Sequence 5 Package (Gain Budget +13): Lightning Bolt Arrow, Ocean Current Manipulation, Water Curtain, plus two legacy upgrades (Navigation and Wrath).

Sequence 4 Package (Gain Budget +33): Hurricane Dominion, Tsunami Judgment, Thunder Chain Edict, Cataclysmic Roar, plus two legacy upgrades (Lightning Bolt Arrow and Ocean Current Manipulation).

Sequence 3 Package (Gain Budget +20): Sea King's Territory, Storm Regalia, Abyssal Tide Warrant, Thunderclap Mandate, plus two legacy upgrades (Hurricane Dominion and Lightning Bolt Arrow).

Sequence 2 Package (Gain Budget +50): Descent of Calamity, Source of Wrath, Magnetic Pole Pull, Sound of Horror, plus two legacy upgrades (Sea King's Territory and Hurricane Dominion).

Sequence 1 Package (Gain Budget +74): Incarnation of Light, Heavenly Punishment, Storm Hell, Ocean of Lightning, plus two legacy upgrades (Descent of Calamity and Source of Wrath).

Sequence 0 Package (Gain Budget +114): Tyrant's Edict, World-Sea Dominion, Heavenfall Tribunal, Sovereign of Tempest, plus two legacy upgrades (Heavenly Punishment and Descent of Calamity).

Continuity Anchor: Sequence 0 completes Sailor as Tyrant authority: storm, sea, and lightning become binding laws that dictate movement, tempo, and survival across the battlefield and surrounding region.
